top_signals.title: Giustra: Copper market needs six new mines a year to 2050
top_signals.summary: Frank Giustra sees looming copper shortages and mounting debt reshaping mining, gold and global capital flows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Progress urges ShareFile customers to shut down servers over "credible" threat
top_signals.summary: Progress Software is emailing ShareFile customers who use Storage Zone Controllers to immediately shut down their servers after identifying what it describes as a "credible external security threat" targeting the on-premises secure file-sharing software. [...]

top_signals.title: Lady the right Choice with Yuen up
top_signals.summary: ALL EYES will be on next season’s potential Classic Series contender Gold Patch who returns to the track after a two-month lay-off in the six-furlong Joy and Fun Handicap (1.10pm). This son of Ardrossan has always been highly regarded in the Francis Lui stable, having won two of his four races and been given encouraging [...]

top_signals.title: Trump purges Election Assistance Commission members, months before midterms
top_signals.summary: The White House said the Supreme Court's ruling allowing President Trump to fire FTC Commissioner Louise Slaughter provided the precedent for the removals.

top_signals.title: Breeze and Monarch can make chances Count at Sha Tin
top_signals.summary: SUNDAY’s Class One Hong Kong Racehorse Owners Association Trophy Handicap (12.35pm) over a mile holds centre stage for Sha Tin’s final meeting of the 2025/26 season. Historically, records show gallopers in the lower half of the handicap have an advantage over top weights. That trend looks likely to continue with several well-rated performers lurking near [...]

top_signals.title: Bolt eyes former Zipcar customers with London car-sharing push
top_signals.summary: Bolt is expanding into UK car sharing through a new partnership with Hiyacar, as the ride-hailing giant looks to fill the gap left by Zipcar’s withdrawal from London. From autumn, Londoners will be able to book Hiyacar vehicles directly through the Bolt app without paying a membership fee, marking the first UK launch of Bolt [...]

top_signals.title: OpenMandriva Linux says contributor tried to sabotage the project
top_signals.summary: The OpenMandriva Linux project announced that it was the target of an attempted act of internal sabotage after a dispute among contributors. [...]
